Motorcycle repair · Welding · Custom fabrication

RIDE IN.

STRONGER.

General maintenance, honest repair, certified welding, and one-off custom fabrication — done by hands that ride. Two builds are rolling through this page right now. Scroll and ride along.

Book a repair See the builds
Scroll to ride
WELD
The shop
One garage.
Two hands.
Zero shortcuts.

Rising Sun Kustoms is a working shop, not a showroom. Engines get diagnosed, frames get welded, and every bike leaves better than it came in. If it rolls on two wheels, it belongs here.

TIG / MIG certified All makes welcome Rider owned
What we do

Four ways in.

Pick your lane — or bring us the whole problem.
/ 01

Maintenance

Oil, tires, brakes, chains, tune-ups. The unglamorous work that keeps her running right — done on time, priced straight.

Keep it running
/ 02

Repair

From a stubborn no-start to a full teardown. Real diagnostics, real parts, and a call before we touch anything expensive.

Fix it right
/ 03

Welding

TIG and MIG on steel, stainless, and aluminum. Frames, brackets, exhausts, cracked cases — beads you'll want to show off.

Welded strong
/ 04

Custom fab

One-off parts that don't exist until we make them. Sissy bars, mounts, fenders, whole rolling ideas — drawn, cut, welded, ridden.

Built from scratch
The builds

Flag colors only.

Six finishes of the house cruiser — every one red, white, and blue.

Old Glory

Deep crimson, white pinstripe, chrome that catches every light. The one that starts the story.

Liberty

Pearl white with twin lines — one crimson, one blue — running nose to tail.

Patriot

Deep navy metallic under a single crisp white stripe. Quiet until it isn't.

Freedom

White base, double red racing stripes, blue nose. Track-day patriotism.

Midnight

Satin black with one thin red coachline. For riders who let the exhaust talk.

Star Spangled

Blue metal-flake tank scattered with stars, red fenders striped white. The full anthem.
